snippets.comment: Great professor! I had him for both linear algebra and differentials. His tests are fair and easy (in my opinion), class is always fun and chill, and he is just in general a great professor and person.

Took a professor for Math 255 & 260 in the same semester. Very knowledgeable and easy to interact with during lectures. Clear grading criteria with average difficulty tests aimed at testing understanding of concepts, not memorization. Makes topic lists for tests, hosts study sessions before the test

(for reference I took his summer class) Amazing amazing amazing prof. very kind and relatable. The class content IS difficult, but Iwama's lectures are great and he will take sooo much extra time to help you and tries his best to give clear answers to questions. Don't hesitate to reach out to him. Y
